CircusDelightRules.Rule1: Circus Delight is a 5-reel, 3-row video slot featuring free spins with multiplier.

Rule2.value: The game is played with 25 bet lines (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule2.comment: Both %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced by the currency symbol, do not translate. Both %{minChip} and %{maxChip} will be replaced by multiplier, do not translate.
Rule2.example: TThe game is played with 20 base bet for 2,025 ways - 32,400 ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.1 to 8.

CircusDelightRules.Rule3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

CircusDelightWildRules.Rule1: Any wins involving Wild symbols are multiplied by x2.
CircusDelightWildRules.Rule2: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.

CircusDelightFreeSpinFeatures.FreeSpinExplain1: 3, 4 or 5 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature.
CircusDelightFreeSpinFeatures.FreeSpinExplain2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, tap on one of the 3 purple cannons to reveal the number of free spins, and then tap on one of the 3 red cannons to reveal the multiplier for the free spins.
CircusDelightFreeSpinFeatures.FreeSpinExplain3: 3 Scatter symbols will award either 8, 12 or 20 free spins during the purple cannon selection.
CircusDelightFreeSpinFeatures.FreeSpinExplain4: 4 Scatter symbols will award either 12, 16 or 24 free spins during the purple cannon selection.
CircusDelightFreeSpinFeatures.FreeSpinExplain5: 5 Scatter symbols will award either 20, 24 or 32 free spins during the purple cannon selection.
CircusDelightFreeSpinFeatures.FreeSpinExplain6: Red cannon selection will award either x2, x5 or x12 multiplier, and every free spin win will be multiplied by this multiplier.
CircusDelightFreeSpinFeatures.FreeSpinExplain7: If no selection is made after 30 seconds, a selection will be randomly chosen.
CircusDelightFreeSpinFeatures.FreeSpinExplain8: 3, 4 or 5 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere during the Free Spins Feature will award 8, 12 or 20 more free spins respectively.
